_metadata.title: Complete Federal Grant Required Forms by Agency
_metadata.notes: Forms lists are comprehensive but individual NOFOs may add or remove requirements. Always cross-check against the specific solicitation.

universal_forms.description: Required by ALL federal agencies for virtually all grant applications

prerequisites.name: SAM.gov Registration
prerequisites.notes: Must be active at time of application AND throughout award period

prerequisites.name: Unique Entity Identifier (UEI)
prerequisites.notes: 12-character identifier issued via SAM.gov. Replaced DUNS April 2022.

prerequisites.name: Employer Identification Number (EIN/TIN)
prerequisites.notes: IRS-issued. Required for all organizational applicants.

standard_forms.name: Application for Federal Assistance
standard_forms.notes: Core application form. Nearly every federal grant requires this. Version 4.0 current.

standard_forms.name: Budget Information - Non-Construction Programs
standard_forms.notes: Required for non-construction programs. Use SF-424C for construction.

standard_forms.name: Assurances - Non-Construction Programs
standard_forms.notes: Standard assurances. Requires authorized representative signature. Use SF-424D for construction.

standard_forms.name: Budget Information - Construction Programs
standard_forms.notes: Required ONLY for construction programs. Replaces SF-424A.

standard_forms.name: Assurances - Construction Programs
standard_forms.notes: Required ONLY for construction programs. Replaces SF-424B.

standard_forms.name: Disclosure of Lobbying Activities
standard_forms.notes: Required if award exceeds $100,000. Must disclose any paid lobbying. Even if no lobbying, many agencies require the form with 'N/A'.

standard_forms.name: Certification Regarding Lobbying
standard_forms.notes: Separate from SF-LLL. Certifies no federal funds used for lobbying. Some agencies embed this in their own certification forms.

universal_documents.name: Indirect Cost Rate Agreement (NICRA) or De Minimis Certification
universal_documents.notes: Upload current federally-approved NICRA, or certify use of 15% de minimis rate per 2 CFR 200.414(f). De minimis only available if org has NEVER had a negotiated rate.

universal_documents.name: Single Audit Report (SF-SAC)
universal_documents.notes: Per 2 CFR 200 Subpart F. Threshold is $1,000,000 in federal expenditures per fiscal year. Must be submitted to Federal Audit Clearinghouse.

universal_documents.name: IRS 501(c)(3) Determination Letter
universal_documents.notes: Proof of tax-exempt status for nonprofit applicants.

step1_grants_gov_forms.name: Application for Federal Assistance
step1_grants_gov_forms.notes: Submit at least 48 hours before JustGrants deadline

step1_grants_gov_forms.name: Disclosure of Lobbying Activities
step1_grants_gov_forms.notes: Downloaded from Grants.gov, completed, and uploaded

step2_justgrants_web_forms.name: Standard Applicant Information
step2_justgrants_web_forms.notes: Pre-populated from SF-424. Must review, verify ZIP codes, confirm Authorized Representative.

step2_justgrants_web_forms.name: Proposal Abstract
step2_justgrants_web_forms.notes: Summary of proposed project. Cannot contain PII.

step2_justgrants_web_forms.name: Financial Management and System of Internal Controls Questionnaire
step2_justgrants_web_forms.notes: Assesses financial management capability. Includes high-risk disclosure from other agencies. Required for all except individuals.

step2_justgrants_web_forms.name: Agency Funding Priorities Inventory
step2_justgrants_web_forms.notes: Answer inventory questions in web form.

step2_justgrants_web_forms.name: Budget Detail (Web-based or Attachment)
step2_justgrants_web_forms.notes: Two methods: web-based form (new competitive) or separate attachment (continuation). Must show salary rates and % time.

step2_justgrants_web_forms.name: Budget Narrative
step2_justgrants_web_forms.notes: Brief descriptions supporting all budget line items.

step2_justgrants_web_forms.name: Consolidated Category Summary
step2_justgrants_web_forms.notes: High-level overview by category, year, and total. Includes federal funds, match, program income.

step2_justgrants_web_forms.name: Applicant Disclosure of Duplication in Cost Items
step2_justgrants_web_forms.notes: Discloses pending applications for same project at other agencies.

step2_justgrants_web_forms.name: Applicant Disclosure of Pending Applications
step2_justgrants_web_forms.notes: Lists other federal/state funding agencies and NOFO/project names.

step2_justgrants_certifications.name: DOJ Certified Standard Assurances
step2_justgrants_certifications.notes: Review and accept in JustGrants. Covers civil rights compliance and nondiscrimination.

step2_justgrants_certifications.name: DOJ Certifications Regarding Lobbying, Debarment, Suspension, Drug-Free Workplace, and Coordination
step2_justgrants_certifications.notes: Must sign certification document in JustGrants system.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Indirect Cost Rate Agreement (NICRA)
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: Upload current federally-approved rate agreement, or de minimis certification.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Research and Evaluation Independence and Integrity Statement
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: Address actual/potential conflicts of interest. Include mitigation plan.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Memorandum of Understanding (MOU)
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: One document for all named partners. Include org names, services, duration. Should be signed.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Letters of Support
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: One combined attachment. Must be signed.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Curriculum Vitae / Resumes for Key Personnel
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: For all key personnel implementing project. OR description of experience/skills if position not yet filled.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Organizational Chart
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: Shows reporting structure and project staff placement.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Position Descriptions for Key Personnel
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: Job descriptions for each key position.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Timeline / Project Schedule
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: Key activities, milestones, months/quarters for completion.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Tribal Authorizing Resolution
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: Resolution, letter, or affidavit demonstrating tribal authorization. Consortium bylaws if applicable.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Disclosure of Process Related to Executive Compensation
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: Describes compensation determination processes for nonprofits claiming IRC 26 CFR 53.4958-6 compliance.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: DOJ High-Risk Grantee Applicant Disclosure and Justification
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: Describes corrective actions and risk mitigation.

step2_justgrants_attachments.name: Tools, Instruments, Questionnaires, Tables, Charts, Graphs, or Maps
List of Individuals in Application
step2_justgrants_attachments.notes: Roster of all individuals named in the application.

required_forms_and_sections.name: NSF Cover Sheet
components: International cooperation boxes with country names

required_forms_and_sections.name: Project Summary
required_forms_and_sections.notes: MUST contain all three labeled sections. Critical for compliance.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Project Description
components: Results from Prior NSF Support (if applicable, max 5 pages)
required_forms_and_sections.notes: Must be self-contained - no URLs. Solicitation may set different page limit.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Biographical Sketch(es)
required_forms_and_sections.notes: MUST be prepared via SciENcv (as of May 2024). Separate sketch per senior/key person. Synergistic activities now in separate document.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Current and Pending (Other) Support
required_forms_and_sections.notes: MUST be prepared via SciENcv. Separate document per senior/key person. PDF uploaded to Research.gov.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Collaborators and Other Affiliations (COA)
required_forms_and_sections.notes: Required per PAPPG. NSF COA template must be used.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Synergistic Activities
required_forms_and_sections.notes: NEW as of May 2024 - separated from biographical sketch. Lists up to 5 examples.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Proposal Budget
required_forms_and_sections.notes: Documentation and justification for each line item. Contracts on Line G6. Indirect costs with negotiated rates.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Budget Justification
required_forms_and_sections.notes: 5-page max per proposing organization. Justification for each budget category.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Facilities, Equipment, and Other Resources
required_forms_and_sections.notes: Aggregated description. In-kind contributions. NO quantifiable financial info. Must include statement even if no resources.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Data Management and Sharing Plan
required_forms_and_sections.notes: Types of data, standards, access/sharing plan, archiving.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Mentoring Plan
required_forms_and_sections.notes: Covers both postdoctoral researchers AND graduate students.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Collaboration Plan / Multi-Organization Arrangements
required_forms_and_sections.notes: Required for collaborative proposals from multiple organizations.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Letters of Collaboration
required_forms_and_sections.notes: Must use NSF-approved format. Brief, factual statements only.

required_forms_and_sections.name: Authorization to Deviate from NSF Proposal Preparation Requirements
required_forms_and_sections.notes: Required if any deviation from PAPPG guidelines.

single_copy_documents.name: List of Suggested Reviewers or Reviewers Not To Include

sf424_rr_forms.name: Application for Federal Assistance (Research & Related)
sf424_rr_forms.notes: Core application form. Version I for due dates on/after Jan 25, 2025.

sf424_rr_forms.name: R&R Other Project Information Form
components: Project Narrative (2-3 sentences, public health relevance)

sf424_rr_forms.name: Project/Performance Site Location(s) Form
sf424_rr_forms.notes: All performance sites must be listed.

sf424_rr_forms.name: R&R Senior/Key Person Profile (Expanded) Form
sf424_rr_forms.notes: Includes biographical sketch attachment for each person. NIH biosketch format required.

sf424_rr_forms.name: R&R Budget Form (Detailed)
sf424_rr_forms.notes: Detailed line-item budget. Required for direct costs >$250K/year.

phs_forms.name: PHS 398 Cover Page Supplement Form
phs_forms.notes: Includes human subjects, vertebrate animals, stem cells info.

phs_forms.name: PHS 398 Modular Budget Form
phs_forms.notes: Modular budget in $25K increments. For R01s with direct costs ≤$250K/year.

phs_forms.name: PHS 398 Research Plan Form
components: Research Strategy (12 pages for R01, 6 for R03/R21)
Authentication of Key Biological and/or Chemical Resources
phs_forms.notes: Core research content. Page limits vary by mechanism.

phs_forms.form_number: PHS Human Subjects and Clinical Trials Information
phs_forms.name: PHS Human Subjects and Clinical Trials Information Form
phs_forms.notes: Detailed human subjects protection information. Includes clinical trial fields if applicable.

phs_forms.name: PHS Assignment Request Form
phs_forms.notes: Optional. Request specific study section or institute assignment.

required_attachments.name: Specific Aims
required_attachments.notes: Goals, objectives, expected outcomes, impact on field.

required_attachments.name: Research Strategy
required_attachments.notes: 12 pages for R01. Three sections: Significance, Innovation, Approach.

required_attachments.name: Project Summary/Abstract
required_attachments.notes: Suitable for public dissemination.

required_attachments.name: Project Narrative
required_attachments.notes: 2-3 sentences on public health relevance in lay terms.

required_attachments.name: Bibliography & References Cited
required_attachments.notes: No page limit. All authors, full citation.

required_attachments.name: Facilities & Other Resources
required_attachments.notes: Lab, animal, computer, office, clinical facilities.

required_attachments.name: Equipment
required_attachments.notes: Major equipment already available. Locations and capabilities.

required_attachments.name: NIH Biographical Sketch
required_attachments.notes: NIH format. Personal statement, positions, contributions, scholastic performance (trainees). Via SciENcv or NIH format.

required_attachments.name: Other Support (Current and Pending)
required_attachments.notes: NOT submitted with application. Requested Just-in-Time before award.

required_attachments.name: Budget Justification
required_attachments.notes: Personnel justification always required. Full justification for detailed budgets.

required_attachments.name: Vertebrate Animals Section
required_attachments.notes: Description of procedures, justification of species, minimization of pain/distress.

required_attachments.name: Human Subjects Protection Documentation
required_attachments.notes: IRB approval/exemption, informed consent, data safety monitoring plan.

required_attachments.name: Select Agent Research
required_attachments.notes: IBC approval, registration with CDC/APHIS.

required_attachments.name: Multiple PD/PI Leadership Plan
required_attachments.notes: Describes roles, governance, communication.

required_attachments.name: Consortium/Contractual Arrangements
required_attachments.notes: Describe roles, performance sites, administrative arrangements.

required_attachments.name: Letters of Support
required_attachments.notes: From collaborators, consultants, or resource providers.

required_attachments.name: Resource Sharing Plan(s)
required_attachments.notes: Data sharing, model organisms, genomic data sharing (GDS) policy compliance.

required_attachments.name: Authentication of Key Biological and/or Chemical Resources
required_attachments.notes: Plan for authenticating key resources (cell lines, specialty chemicals, antibodies, etc.).

required_attachments.name: Cover Letter
required_attachments.notes: Optional but encouraged. Required for mentored CDAs (must include list of referees). Do NOT use for assignment preferences.

required_attachments.name: Inclusion of Women and Minorities
required_attachments.notes: Inclusion enrollment report. Targeted/planned enrollment table.

required_attachments.name: Inclusion of Children
required_attachments.notes: Justification for inclusion or exclusion of children.

prerequisites: eRA Commons account for PI and all senior/key personnel
Signing Official (SO) designation in eRA Commons

hud.agency: Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD)

required_forms.name: Assurances and Certifications for Recipients and Applicants
required_forms.notes: HUD-SPECIFIC. Replaces SF-424B and SF-424D. Covers civil rights certifications.

required_forms.name: Budget Information - Non-Construction Programs
required_forms.notes: One of several budget form options.

required_forms.name: Detailed Budget Form / Entity Information and Subrecipient Certifications
required_forms.notes: HUD-specific detailed budget form. Alternative to SF-424A depending on program.

required_forms.name: HUD Funding Matrix
required_forms.notes: Shows all funding sources for the project.

required_forms.name: Applicant/Recipient Disclosure/Update Report
required_forms.notes: Discloses all financial assistance received and pending. Must be updated.

required_forms.name: Third Party Documentation Facsimile Transmittal
required_forms.notes: Cover page for faxed third-party documentation. Uses OCR - must use official form.

required_forms.name: Assurances - Non-Construction Programs
required_forms.notes: May be required in addition to HUD-424-B per specific NOFO.

required_attachments.name: Project Abstract
required_attachments.notes: Summary of proposed project.

required_attachments.name: Project Narrative
required_attachments.notes: Detailed description per NOFO requirements.

required_attachments.name: Certification of Consistency with RC/EZ/EC-II Strategic Plan
required_attachments.notes: Required for projects in designated zones.

required_attachments.name: Civil Rights Certifications
required_attachments.notes: Embedded in HUD-424-B. Covers Title VI, Title VIII, Section 504, Age Discrimination Act, etc.

required_attachments.name: Affirmatively Furthering Fair Housing Certification
required_attachments.notes: Certification that applicant will affirmatively further fair housing.

required_attachments.name: Match / Leverage Documentation
required_attachments.notes: Documentation of committed matching funds.

required_attachments.name: Organizational Capacity Narrative
required_attachments.notes: Demonstrates organizational ability to carry out the project.

required_forms_pre_award.name: Preaward Compliance Review Report
required_forms_pre_award.notes: Civil rights preaward review. Must be completely filled out or EPA will follow up. Version 5.0 current.

required_forms_pre_award.name: Key Contact Form for Multiple Principal Investigator
Certification Regarding Lobbying
required_forms_pre_award.notes: EPA-specific lobbying certification. Required for awards >$100,000. Must have current authorized signature.

required_forms_pre_award.name: Limited Scope Administrative and Financial Review Questionnaire

required_attachments.name: Detailed Work Plan
required_attachments.notes: Project objectives, methods, timeline, deliverables.

required_attachments.name: Budget Narrative
required_attachments.notes: Justification for each budget category.

required_attachments.name: Quality Assurance Project Plan (QAPP)
required_attachments.notes: Required post-award (within 30-90 days) for projects collecting environmental data. Cannot begin data collection until EPA approves. Must meet QAPP Standard per July 2023 requirements.

required_attachments.name: National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA) Documentation
required_attachments.notes: EPA must complete NEPA process before issuing award for construction activities.

required_attachments.name: Indirect Cost Rate Agreement
required_attachments.notes: Current NICRA or de minimis certification.

post_award_forms.name: MBE/WBE Utilization Under Federal Grants and Cooperative Agreements
post_award_forms.notes: Minority/Women Business Enterprise reporting. Currently suspended.

post_award_forms.name: Tangible Personal Property Report
post_award_forms.notes: Includes variants: SF-428-A (Annual), SF-428-B (Final), SF-428-C (Disposition), SF-428S (Supplement).

post_award_forms.name: Data Collection Form for Single Audits

governing_documents: HMA Program and Policy Guide Version 2.1 (January 2025)

forms.name: Benefit-Cost Analysis (BCA)
forms.notes: Must use FEMA BCA Toolkit. Discount rate reduced to 3.1% (from 7%). Required to demonstrate cost-effectiveness.

forms.name: Environmental and Historic Preservation (EHP) Screening Form
forms.notes: Initiates EHP compliance review for projects modifying buildings/structures or new construction.

forms.name: Scope of Work
forms.notes: Detailed project description with schedule and budget.

forms.name: Cost Estimate
forms.notes: Detailed cost breakdown supporting the budget.

forms.name: FEMA-Approved Hazard Mitigation Plan
forms.notes: Applicant's jurisdiction must have a FEMA-approved plan.

forms.name: Investment Justification (IJ)
forms.notes: Min 2, max 12 strategic investments. Must show core capability alignment. LETPA compliance (>=35%).

forms.name: Senior Advisory Committee (SAC) Charter and Membership
forms.notes: Charter plus membership list with POC info.

forms.name: Urban Area Working Group (UAWG) Charter and Membership
forms.notes: Charter plus membership list with POC info.

forms.name: Pre-Award Costs Request Letter
forms.notes: Must be signed by Authorized Organization Representative.

auto_generation_summary.description: Summary of which forms the GrantPro system can auto-generate vs. requiring upload
can_auto_generate_from_user_data: SF-424 (Application for Federal Assistance) - from org profile + project info
SF-424A (Budget - Non-Construction) - from budget data
SF-424C (Budget - Construction) - from budget data
SF-LLL (Lobbying Disclosure) - from org profile
Project Summaries / Abstracts - from project description AI
Project Narratives - from project description AI
Budget Detail Worksheets - from budget data
Budget Narratives / Justifications - from budget data + AI
Timelines / Project Schedules - from milestones
Letters of Support / Collaboration - from partner info + AI templates
MOUs - from partner info + AI templates
Position Descriptions - from key personnel + project info
Research Independence Statements - from org profile + AI
Scope of Work documents - from project info + AI
Investment Justifications - from project info + capabilities + AI
NSF Cover Sheet fields - from org profile + project info
NIH Specific Aims - from research questions + AI
NIH Research Strategy sections - from project info + methods + AI
EPA Key Contacts Form (5700-54) - from contact info
HUD Funding Matrix (424-M) - from budget + funding sources
Consolidated Category Summary (DOJ) - from budget data
must_be_uploaded_by_user: SF-424B/D (Assurances) - requires authorized signature on official form
Biographical Sketches (NSF via SciENcv, NIH via NIH format)
Current and Pending Support (NSF via SciENcv, NIH Just-in-Time)
Collaborators and Other Affiliations (NSF COA template)
can_generate_reasonable_draft_for_user_r: DOJ Budget Detail Worksheet - generate pre-filled, user verifies
DOJ Proposal Narrative - AI draft from intake data
NIH Specific Aims page - AI draft from research questions
NIH Research Strategy - AI draft sections from project info
NSF Project Summary - AI draft with 3 required sections
NSF Project Description - AI draft framework
NSF Data Management Plan - AI draft from project type template
NSF Mentoring Plan - AI draft from personnel info
EPA Work Plan - AI draft from project objectives
FEMA Investment Justification - AI draft from capabilities assessment
Letters of Support - AI template for partner to customize and sign
MOUs - AI template with standard clauses
Position Descriptions - AI draft from role requirements
